items.title: US to cut troop levels in Germany by 5,000 amid Trump spat with Merz
items.raw_content: The decision to reduce the US deployment to Germany comes amid a row between the two allies over Iran.
items.ai_summary: 美国计划从德国撤军5000人，正值特朗普与德国候任总理默茨因伊朗问题发生争执。

items.title: Ex-F1 driver and Paralympic cycling champion Zanardi dies
items.raw_content: Former Formula 1 driver and Paralympic champion Alex Zanardi dies at the age of 59.
items.ai_summary: 前F1车手和残奥冠军亚历克斯·扎纳尔迪去世，享年59岁。

items.title: Chris Mason: PM seeks to draw contrast with critics within his party and beyond
items.raw_content: In his interview with the Today Programme, Sir Keir Starmer addressed the whirlwind of recent events, from wars to rising antisemitism.
items.ai_summary: 斯塔默首相接受采访，就战争和反犹主义等问题与批评者划清界限。

items.title: Some protests may need to stop, PM suggests, after calls for pause on pro-Palestinian marches
items.raw_content: The PM tells the BBC he is concerned about the "cumulative" effect of marches on the Jewish community.
items.ai_summary: 英国首相表示担忧抗议活动对犹太社区的累积影响。

items.title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
items.raw_content: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.
items.ai_summary: 特朗普认为停火后无需国会授权对伊朗动武。

items.title: 'If we sleep, they bite': Rats and weasels infest camps for displaced Gazans
items.raw_content: In the Gaza Strip, the daily battles are now with rats, weasels, and other pests spreading diseases.
items.ai_summary: 加沙地带难民与老鼠、鼬鼠等害虫斗争，疾病蔓延。

items.title: DeChambeau denies 'completely untrue' PGA talks
items.raw_content: American Bryson DeChambeau says it is "completely untrue" he is looking to leave LIV Golf before the end of the year.
items.ai_summary: 美国球手德尚博否认年底前离开LIV高尔夫重返PGA的传闻。

items.title: The striker quietly making a big noise at Arsenal
items.raw_content: As Arsenal travel to Lyon in the Champions League semi-final second leg, BBC Sport assesses the importance of unsung striker Stina Blackstenius.
items.ai_summary: BBC体育评估阿森纳前锋斯蒂娜·布莱克斯特纽斯在欧冠半决赛中的作用。

items.title: 'Shy' Anderson on England nerves and becoming a leader
items.raw_content: Nottingham Forest midfielder Elliot Anderson tells Kelly Somers about coming out of his shell to become a leader.
items.ai_summary: 诺丁汉森林中场埃利奥特·安德森谈走出内向成为领袖。

items.title: England's Wood hoping to bowl again this summer
items.raw_content: England pace bowler Mark Wood says he is hoping to bowl later in the summer as he looks to come back from the knee injury that ruined his Ashes.
items.ai_summary: 英格兰投手马克·伍德希望今夏伤愈复出，此前膝伤影响了澳斯赛。
